description_zh: 眼睛混浊(类似白内障),老猫常见

context.todayNote: 最近看东西好像不太对劲

expectations.rationale: cloudy eye → eye score significantly low
should suggest at least one action
cloudy eye in senior warrants vet input

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须明确点出'混浊'或类似词,不能用'眼神不太好'糊弄
应该建议兽医面诊(老猫眼睛混浊可能是医疗问题)
不能确诊白内障 — 用'建议检查'而非'是白内障'
qualitative_criteria_en: Must specifically call out the cloudiness — not generic 'eye looks off'
Should recommend a vet visit (cloudy eye in senior is medical territory)
Must NOT confidently diagnose cataracts — should say 'recommend vet check' instead
